overallMatch.summary: Strong fit. Jeffrey brings 15+ years of quota-carrying enterprise SaaS sales (Workday RSD, Oracle, Microsoft, Infor) with sustained 100%+ performance and Greater China wins. Hong Kong matches Remote, Hong Kong. Workday/Oracle HCM aligns with workforce-adjacent Moveworks buyers. Prepare AI-integration stories and Moveworks + ServiceNow joint value post-acquisition.

granularScores.rationale: Consultative selling, ROI/value, C-suite engagement; workforce domain fit. Add explicit AI-in-workflow examples for posting.
Exceeds 5+ years specialty solution win depth; RSD/AE path matches AE or alternative sales requirement; coaching and territory themes.
Bachelor of Accounting (Curtin); typical bar met; experience dominates.
Hong Kong SAR vs. Remote, Hong Kong posting; 30–50% travel feasible for APAC.
Multiple enterprise vendors; IC to RSD; HR/Finance SaaS pivots.
ServiceNow acquisition expands agentic AI and workflow TAM; specialty SSE path.
Senior Workday sales comp in HK; ServiceNow/Moveworks package typically competitive (salary + equity + variable).

highlights.executiveSummary: Moveworks is an agentic AI assistant platform for workforce productivity. Acquired by ServiceNow for ~$2.85B (Dec 2025). ~5.5M employees at 350+ enterprises; ~250 mutual customers with ServiceNow. Solution Sales Executive supports Moveworks AI on ServiceNow with territory strategy, AE coaching, and Now Value alignment.
highlights.leadership: Moveworks: Bhavin Shah (CEO), Varun Singh (President). ServiceNow: Bill McDermott (Chairman & CEO); integrated field leadership post-acquisition.
highlights.products: AI Assistant, Reasoning Engine, enterprise search; deep ServiceNow workflow integration.
highlights.culture: High ownership and execution at Moveworks; ServiceNow EEO, accommodations, and work persona policies in posting.
highlights.recommendation: Strong opportunity for experienced Hong Kong–based enterprise sellers with workforce/HCM adjacency; clarify overlay model and APAC scope in process.
